LanguageData.Ammo_VQEC_CryptoBolt.label: crypto bolt
LanguageData.Ammo_VQEC_CryptoBolt.description: Metal-cored projectiles wrapped in unstable crypto technology contained with an energy field. Capable of dealing both ballistic damage and causing serious hypothermia.
LanguageData.Bullet_VQEC_CryptoBolt.label: crypto bolt
